items.title: Shock as dozens of bodies, mostly infants, discovered in Kenya mass grave
items.dek: Some of the 32 bodies, including 25 children, are believed to have come from local hospitals and mortuaries.
items.body: Some of the 32 bodies, including 25 children, are believed to have come from local hospitals and mortuaries.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Graffiti conviction for Australian woman who stuck googly eyes on sculpture
items.dek: The woman had taken MDMA and three litres of vodka when she vandalised the piece nicknamed Blue Blob.
items.body: The woman had taken MDMA and three litres of vodka when she vandalised the piece nicknamed Blue Blob.
